kaalsarp_dosha.bot_response: You do not have Kaal-Sarp dosha
remedies: Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. A person having Kaal Sarpa Yoga in his/her kundli should worship Lord Shiva regularly and for better results, one can also chant the Moola Mantra of Lord Shiva. “Om Namah Shivaya”(ॐ नमः शिवाय). This mantra acts as a Kaal Sarpa Dosha Nivaran mantra. The students who are affected by the malefic effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga should chant the Moola Mantra of Goddess Sarasvati. Chanting the Moola mantra will enhance the concentration power of the students and as a result, they will be able to perform better. ‘Om SaraswatiMayaa Drishtwa, VeenaPustak Dharnim| HansVahini Samayuktaa MaaVidya DaanKarotu Me Om’

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. In an auspicious Muhurat, offer three pieces of coal in flowing water, one at a time. It is one of the best Kaal Sarpa Dosh remedies. This will nullify the effect of Kaal Sarpa Dosh from the native’s horoscope and he/she would be able to lead a more peaceful and happy life.Chanting Hanuman Chalisa 108 times regularly is highly beneficial for the natives who are suffering from Kaal Sarpa Yoga. The people who are affected by this yoga can also visit Lord Hanuman’s Mandir and can apply a Tilak of Sindhoor from the idol of Lord Hanuman.

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. Chanting Maha Mrityunjaya Mantra 108 times on a Rudraksha Rosary will help the native in getting rid of the Kaal Sarpa Yoga.'Om Tayambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pustivardhanam. Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrtyor Muksiya Mamratat’.
Keeping a peacock’s feather in the home will reduce the effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga. Children can also keep it in their books for enhancing their concentration level.

On every Saturday, worshipping Lord Shani and chanting the Moola Mantra of Lord Shani will reduce the effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga. People can also offer sesame and black gram to Lord Shani.‘Om Shani Charaya Namaha’

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. Place the Kaal Sarpa Yoga Yantra in your home in an auspicious Mahurat to get rid of the Kaal sarpa Yoga. You can also chant this Moola mantra for energizing the yantra. “Bramha Muri Tripurantkari Bhanuh Shashih BhumiSuto Budhashch”
Do pooja on Naag Panchami and after the pooja, make sure that the snake charmer frees the snake in an open ground.

General Shiva Pooja. Even a general Shiva Pooja where one would chant a certain Stotra of Lord Shiva will also reduce the impact of Kaal Sarpaa Dosha. This will please Lord Shiva who can remove all the problems from a natives life. This canting of the mantras in the pooja should be done religiously and with an outbreak.

Do Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja. On every Monday, on the same place and time, offer a handful of wheat, shrivel and a coin of 1, 2, 5, or 10. Chant the name of Lord Rama while offering all these things. Make sure that you take the same value of the coin on every Monday. Perform this cycle of activities for 21 Mondays and get rid of this Yoga.

personal_characteristics.personalised_prediction: Since the  1st lord, Saturn is in the 9th house, Life teaches you profound lessons through hardships before revealing true beliefs. Skepticism towards conventional wisdom often drives you to seek personal truths, valuing achievements born of perseverance.

Since the  2nd lord, Jupiter is in the 5th house, You are likely to become a teacher or guru, earning money through your ability to guide others. Your openness to creative pursuits and finance-related endeavors will help you find success.

Since the  3rd lord, Mars is in the 11th house, You shall be someone who will be putting in a lot of efforts for higher studies. You can also be adept in religion and philosophy. You will gain from working in large institutions. You will be stubborn about the beliefs of your religion. You may not have a good relationship with your sibling.

Since the  4th lord, Venus is in the 8th house, You may be involved in an abusive physical relationship. You may be involved in secret love affairs despite being married. You may also earn money through research works. You may lose wealth due to problems in inheritance.

Since the  5th lord, Mercury is in the 7th house, You shall a communicative and a fun spouse who will make you laugh and shall be very creative. You shall be very good with the kids and will be direct in speech. Your spouse can even be of emotional nature which may sometimes lead to fights.

Since the  6th lord, Moon is in the 3rd house, Your mother shall have to go through a lot of pain in her life. Your mind can be focused on nursing and healing so you may take up professions linked to that. You may also become a relationship counselor.

Since the  7th lord, Sun is in the 7th house, You and your spouse shall both be egoists by nature. Your spouse may be an authoritative figure in the government and so can be your father. Ego battles between husband and wife shall burn down your marriage.

Since the  8th lord, Mercury is in the 7th house, You will have a business-oriented communicative spouse. Your spouse will have great business ideas as a result of which your assets will increase after your marriage. Your spouse will be very calculative in the matter of wealth and assets. You will be working the field of revenue or taxes.

Since the  9th lord, Venus is in the 8th house, You shall be in love with the occult side of life but at the same time you will be keeping a secret love affair about which no one shall know. You shall be individualistic by nature and keep your wealth separate from your partner.

Since the  10th lord, Mars is in the 11th house, You shall be working in large financial institutions like in the banking sector. You may also have a business related to finance. You will both gain and lose money at the same rate. Relation with father will be a dominance struggle.

Since the  11th lord, Jupiter is in the 5th house, You can be a very good teacher or shall be a counselor to different people. You will be devoted to the field of education. You shall guide people about higher learning and the different philosophies of life. You can also become a business-minded person and gain wealth.

Since the  12th lord, Saturn is in the 9th house, Higher learning shall come with a lot of delay in life. You shall be very strict regarding law and order and shall be a very hard worker. Long-distance travel shall come very late in your life. Your spouse shall be elder and be very mature. You shall have an easy life but only after the thirties.
